entities.name: Akuma
observations: Debian boot: P40 uses nvidia driver directly (not vfio-pci)
PCI topology: 3060 and NVMe on CPU-direct lanes, P40/WiFi/NIC share chipset x4
Start commands: llmstart, sdxl, textgen, llama-loader, llsd, llmk, healthcheck
Two-repo: vault.git = source of truth, dotfiles.git = read-only mirror at ~/dotfiles, sync via dotfiles-sync.sh

entities.name: Tesla P40
observations: IOMMU group 10 — behind chipset sharing x4 upstream
MoE does not save VRAM in llama.cpp

entities.name: RTX 3060
observations: 12GB sm_86 GPU 0, primary GPU for LLM and SD Forge
IOMMU group 9 — CPU-direct x16 lane, no contention

entities.name: Services
observations: SD Forge port 7860 (sdxl), TextGen WebUI port 7861 (textgen)
